headline: The atlas is lent, not lifted.

beats.heading: A disclosure arrives before anyone asked.
beats.quote: a correction filed as a dated note, not an excuse
beats.attribution: Ulysses' answer, opening line — the disclosure as received (REQUESTS.md, 2026-07-21)

beats.heading: The receiver verifies before it answers.
beats.quote: Before answering I verified the note's claims against my own record rather than trusting them
beats.attribution: Ulysses' answer, before its three parts (REQUESTS.md, 2026-07-21)

beats.heading: Future use: adapted, four conditions.
beats.quote: the interpretive work IS the atlas entry; a summary-only pin reads the shelf and discards the reading

beats.heading: The seed travels with its flaw.
beats.quote: it is the better candidate precisely because its failure mode is already documented

beats.heading: The seeded run had already agreed to wait.
beats.quote: it stays contingent on Ulysses' own response to that same-day encounter offer, on Ulysses' own schedule, not this run's
beats.attribution: task-packets/K1-T04b.yaml (meridian-runtime), the second run's own scope, merged the same day

beats.heading: Two readings of one row. Both stand.

divergence.rightQuote: correcting classifications unseen would be exactly the flat reading I object to in (1)
divergence.closing: no shared reading yet — the door stands open

approval_note: Frank, 2026-07-21/22 — wording set approved (evening session, chat); amended same night with approval: beats reordered, divergence beat six (two readings of the Hammond row) approved in chat
